title: Whimscape X Fresh Animations: Objects
description: An (unofficial) add-on pack that makes Fresh Animations: Objects compatible with Whimscape!
body:
- Thanks to [kavast](https://modrinth.com/user/kavast) _for his resource pack_ Whimscape

> [![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab30d3739908c7958f04d056f509c2482950f73.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)

## This pack makes [ Fresh Animations: Objects](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-objects) compatible with Whimscape

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/596b0866cf766d990a0d4c09f66659e19afe90c5.png)

### Recommended packs to use
> [![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe6868ff029af6261f784eee8d52af769b71ff73_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-better-mace)
> [![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d418a5001dc36a8094a99fa7ff07bb8c9951c061.gif)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-better-eating-and-drinking-animations)
> [![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a358946bf5c2ee75901dc9d71cdbb6533dbb0559.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-better-elytra-color)
> [![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c641e6a229ab6c23a995ea721ea93640c831e1.webp)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape-better-containers-gui)
